capas:metrics.mlx_probe: skipped_in_default_trace; use apple_silicon_thermal_routing.py for Metal/MLX device probes

falsification_notes: This is larger than H2O but still a minimal-basis local demonstration.
The electronic FCI solve is exact for STO-3G methane, not for physical methane.
The experimental atomization reference is assembled from rounded tabulated C-H BDE values, so its provenance is weaker than the H2 precision D0 trace.
The harmonic ZPE is same-model and does not include anharmonic spectroscopy.
The defended claim is evidence separation for a larger polyatomic molecule, not competitive thermochemistry.
capas:metrics.observable: CH4/STO-3G FCI atomization energy with model-harmonic ZPE correction
capas:metrics.physical_evidence_detail: CH4/STO-3G is solved by PySCF FCI for the declared finite-basis electronic model. A same-model harmonic ZPE is subtracted from the electronic atomization energy. The trace records a larger polyatomic case where exact model solution does not imply experimental chemical accuracy.

reference_definition_correction.target_reference: D0-like atomization energy with vibrational ground state

experimental.source: Bond dissociation energy reference table; successive methane C-H values 105, 110, 101, and 81 kcal/mol

fci.geometry: CH4 tetrahedral STO-3G demo geometry, C-H about 1.089 Angstrom

capas:metrics.source_label: PySCF FCI CH4/STO-3G model solve + harmonic ZPE + tabulated successive C-H dissociation references

witness_stack.primary: PySCF FCI exact CH4/STO-3G electronic model solve
